name: team drive count from plays
description: Test case for team drive count from plays
expected_query: with "t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", COUNT(DISTINCT CONCAT(esbid, '_', drive_seq)) AS team_drive_count_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_REG_WEEK_19', '2024_REG_WEEK_20', '2024_REG_WEEK_21', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."qtr" in (1) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c_team_stats" as materialized (select "t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c"."nfl_team", sum(t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c.team_drive_count_from_plays) as team_drive_count_from_plays from "t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c" group by "t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c"."nfl_team"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2024) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", "t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c_team_stats"."team_drive_count_from_plays" AS "team_drive_count_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2024 left join "t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c_team_stats" on "t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" where player.pos IN ('TEAM') group by "t8ead18dda01c2b89b68b1f7747f9880c_team_stats"."team_drive_count_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
